title: CUK Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Central University of Kerala (CUK) Project Nurse-III Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Central University of Kerala. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUK Project Nurse-III Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Four-year Nursing Course qualification and maximum age limit of 35 years are eligible to apply for these Project Nurse-III vacancies. The email application process for CUK Project Nurse-III Recruitment 2026 has started on 12 May 2026 and will remain open until 02 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000 Per Month + HRA as admissible

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications Online Interview (Google Meet)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUK Project Nurse-III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUK Project Nurse-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CUK Project Nurse-III position is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse-III post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Nurse-III position is a Four-year Nursing Course. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible for the role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse-III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse-III post is 35 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules, which can be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse-III role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Nurse-III position will receive a salary of Rs. 28000 Per Month, along with HRA as admissible. This is a consolidated monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CUK Project Nurse-III recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the CUK Project Nurse-III recruitment must be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse-III post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for an online interview conducted via Google Meet.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The recruitment is for a Project Nurse-III position on a contract basis with the Central University of Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with your application.
